dataset_meta.entity_profile: Small-to-medium trading + services company, VAT-registered, a handful of employees, single functional currency with occasional FX. Chosen because it exercises both the sales and purchase cycles plus payroll and period-end adjustments — the common denominator across the jurisdictions Kontablo maps.
citations: Weygandt, Kieso & Kimmel (2018), Accounting Principles 13e, Wiley, Ch.7 (Special Journals).
Horngren, Harrison & Oliver (2015), Accounting 10e, Pearson (Special Journals / subsidiary ledgers).
caveats: Weights are reasoned estimates anchored to the special-journals taxonomy, not counted from a real corpus.
Payroll statutory-deduction frequency and withholding-tax-at-source frequency are jurisdiction-sensitive; the values here are mid-range global estimates.
Replacing this block with per-line counts from a licensed anonymized ledger corpus is the designated next step; the script does not change.
